title: Sainik School Satara – TGT, Ward Boy and More – 13 Posts
shortInfo: Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of . Candidates with MBBS, Matriculation, B.Ed Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Sainik School Satara official website sainiksatara.org.

basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 TGT, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of . Candidates with MBBS, Matriculation, B.Ed Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Sainik School Satara official website sainiksatara.org.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 50% marks, B.Ed or equivalent, CTET/STET Paper II, MBBS, Matriculation

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainiksatara.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
